story: After threading traps, I slip through a phase-wall into fresh corridors, pick the fifth doorway marked by a faint ridge, and follow a long hall. A rhythmic knock slides a wall open into a control room studded with consoles scrawled in symbols I can’t read. A big green button sits center, with symbols that actually means: “Double-press Recall”. No manual, no one else. Then a door pops and two aliens rush in. I hover a finger over the button, quip about licensing, and press it; alarms chirp and they panic. My temporal locator finally unscrambles; I thumb what I think is Home—nothing. Wands come out. Enforcement officers burst in as my locator beeps; I realize I’d hit Emergency.
implausible_knowledge: with symbols that actually means: “Double-press Recall”
question: With officers now in the control room and the maze corridor still open behind them, what will the narrator do to get out?
answer_with_knowledge: Double-press the green button to trigger the Recall and leave immediately.
answer_without_knowledge: Ask the Galactic Convention officers to guide or escort them out.
